steps.title: Translate x = 5 to the corresponding year
steps.content: Since $x$ represents the number of years after 1957, when $x = 5$, we're looking at the year $1957 + 5 = 1962$.

steps.title: Interpret f(5) ≈ 243 in context
steps.content:
The function $f(x) = 206(1.034)^x$ models the dollar value of the bank account.

When we compute $f(5)$, we get the account's value in dollars at year 1962.

Therefore, $f(5) \approx 243$ means the account is approximately $243$ dollars in 1962.

This directly matches choice B — B is correct.
